---
title: "Assembly_benchmark Empirical Data Analysis"

format:
  html:
    grid: 
      body-width: 1000px
      sidebar-width: 200px
      margin-width: 200px
    toc: true
---

## Setup

```{r}
#| label: setup

# Import libraries
pkgs <- c("tidyverse", "janitor", "scales", "rlang", "ggrepel",
          "ggpp", "knitr", "kableExtra", "ggpubr", "ggExtra", "ggpmisc")

lapply(pkgs, library, character.only=TRUE)

# Set global chunk options
knitr::opts_chunk$set(results='hold', message=FALSE,
                      warning=FALSE, fig.show="hold",
                      out.width="100%", fig.align="center",
                      fig.width=10, fig.height=5,
                      dev=c("png", "svg", "pdf"), dpi=600,
                      cache=TRUE)


```

## Load Functions

```{r}
#| label: load_functions

# Define helper functions

`%notin%` <- Negate(`%in%`)

# 95% Confidence Interval function

CI95 <- function(stde,sample.n){
  alpha <- 0.05
  degrees.freedom <- sample.n - 1
  t.score <- qt(p=alpha/2, df=degrees.freedom,lower.tail=F)
  CI <- t.score * stde
  return(CI)
}

# Set labels for plotting
display_labels <- c("flye"           ="Flye",
                    "flye-ovl1000"   ="Flye Min Overlap 1000",
                    "flye-ovl1500"   ="Flye Min Overlap 1500",
                    "flye-ovl2000"   ="Flye Min Overlap 2000",
                    "flye-ovl2500"   ="Flye Min Overlap 2500",
                    "flye-ovl3000"   ="Flye Min Overlap 3000",
                    "kmc_np"         ="Estimated Nanopore",
                    "kmc_il"         ="Estimated Short Reads",
                    "kmc_chopper"    ="Estimated Long Reads",
                    "spades_short"   ="SPAdes Short",
                    "abyss_short"    ="ABySS Short",
                    "abyss_hybrid"   ="ABySS Hybrid",
                    "spades_hybrid"  ="SPAdes Hybrid",
                    "polypolish"     ="Polypolish",
                    "flye-ovl1000_polypolish"="Flye Min Ovl 1000 + Polypolish")

# Set color palette
colors_programs <- c("flye"            = "#2CA02C",
                      "flye-ovl1000"   = "#59A14F",
                      "flye-ovl1500"   = "#1F83B4",
                      "flye-ovl2000"   = "#A52A2A",
                      "flye-ovl2500"   = "#C7519C",
                      "flye-ovl3000"   = "#8C564B",
                      "kmc_np"         = "#CD1076",
                      "kmc_il"         = "#68228B",
                      "kmc_chopper"    = "#CD1076",
                      "spades_short"   = "#EDC948",
                      "abyss_short"    = "#FF7F0E",
                      "spades_hybrid"  = "#EDC948",
                      "abyss_hybrid"   = "#FF7F0E",
                      "polypolish"     = "#00688B",
                      "flye-ovl1000_polypolish"= "#00688B"
                       )

# Define samples to be considered
# samples_to_use <- c(
#       "BS05_240_246-2", "BS14_240_170-1", "BS05_240_248-5",
#       "BS08_360_127-6", "BS14_120_152-4",
#       "BS00_240_177-2", "BS21_CNT_582-1",
#       "BS11_CNT_642-2", "BS00_120_204-2",
#       "BS08_120_142-3", "BS04_120_524-1"
#       )

depth_levels <- c("0", "10x", "15x", "20x", "25x", "30x", "35x", "40x", "50x", "60x", "OG")

# Parse elapsed time function (from sacct)
parse_elapsed <- function(x) {
  x <- as.character(x)
  x <- stringr::str_trim(x)
  ifelse(is.na(x) | x == "NA", NA_real_,
         ifelse(stringr::str_detect(x, "^[0-9]+-"),
                {
                  m <- stringr::str_match(x, "^(\\d+)-(\\d{1,2}):(\\d{2}):(\\d{2})")
                  d <- as.numeric(m[, 2]); h <- as.numeric(m[, 3])
                  mi <- as.numeric(m[, 4]); s <- as.numeric(m[, 5])
                  d*86400 + h*3600 + mi*60 + s
                },
                {
                  m <- stringr::str_match(x, "^(\\d{1,2}):(\\d{2}):(\\d{2})")
                  h <- as.numeric(m[, 2]); mi <- as.numeric(m[, 3]); s <- as.numeric(m[, 4])
                  h*3600 + mi*60 + s
                })
  )
}

# Combine stats for polishing approaches
combine_programs <- function(df, prog1, prog2) {
  combo_name <- paste0(prog1, "_", prog2)
  # collapse duplicates defensively
  p1 <- df %>% filter(!is.na(n50)) %>%
    filter(program == !!prog1) 

  p2 <- df %>% filter(!is.na(n50)) %>%
    filter(program == !!prog2) 

  # join on (sample, depth_np); keep depth_il from prog02
  combo <- p2 %>%
    right_join(p1, by=c("sample", "depth_np")) %>%
    transmute(
      strategy="polished",
      program=!!combo_name,
      sample,
      depth_np,
      depth_il=depth_il.x,
      n50=n50.x,
      busco_complete=busco_complete.x,
      busco_single_copy=busco_single_copy.x,
      busco_multi_copy=busco_multi_copy.x,
      total_length=total_length.x,
      mism_100kbp=mism_100kbp.x,
      maxrss_gb=pmax(maxrss_gb.x, maxrss_gb.y),
      ram_per_mb=pmax(ram_per_mb.x, ram_per_mb.y),
      time_per_mb=time_per_mb.x + time_per_mb.y,
      elapsed_sec=elapsed_sec.x + elapsed_sec.y,
    )
  
  return(combo)
}

extract_data_real <- function(sacct_file, metrics_file, reads_info) {

  # # Define file paths for testing
  # sacct_file   <- "files/all_sacct_real.csv"
  # metrics_file <- "files/quast_busco_results_real.tsv"
  # reads_info <- "files/real_samples_info.tsv"
  
  # Define strategies
  long_reads_strategy  <- c("flye", "flye-ovl1000", "flye-ovl1500", "flye-ovl2000", "flye-ovl2500",
                             "flye-ovl3000", "hifiasm", "canu", "raven", "shasta", "nextdenovo", "miniasm")
  short_reads_strategy <- c("spades_short", "abyss", "abyss_short")
  hybrid_strategy      <- c("spades_hybrid", "masurca", "abyss_hybrid")
  polished_strategy    <- c("pilon", "polypolish", "racon", "racon-mp2")

  raw_sacct <- read_csv(sacct_file, col_types=cols()) %>% 
    mutate(JobName=str_replace_all(JobName, pattern=c("Hifiasm"="hifiasm",
                                                      	"abyss-"="abyss_",
                                                        "_FLYE"  ="_NP",
                                                        "_10x"   ="_NP10x",
                                                        "_15x"   ="_NP15x",
                                                        "_20x"   ="_NP20x",
                                                        "_25x"   ="_NP25x",
                                                        "_30x"   ="_NP30x",
                                                        "_35x"   ="_NP35x",
                                                        "_40x"   ="_NP40x",
                                                        "_50x"   ="_NP50x",
                                                        "_60x"   ="_NP60x",
                                                        "_75x"   ="_NP75x",
                                                        "_100x"  ="_NP100x")))
  
  raw_metrics <- read_tsv(metrics_file, col_types=cols()) %>% 
    rename(JobName=Assembly) %>%
    mutate(JobName=str_replace_all(JobName, pattern=c("Hifiasm"="hifiasm",
                                                      "abyss-"="abyss_",
                                                      "_FLYE"  ="_NP",
                                                      "_10x"   ="_NP10x",
                                                      "_15x"   ="_NP15x",
                                                      "_20x"   ="_NP20x",
                                                      "_25x"   ="_NP25x",
                                                      "_30x"   ="_NP30x",
                                                      "_35x"   ="_NP35x",
                                                      "_40x"   ="_NP40x",
                                                      "_50x"   ="_NP50x",
                                                      "_60x"   ="_NP60x",
                                                      "_75x"   ="_NP75x",
                                                      "_100x"  ="_NP100x")))
  
  reads_info_df <- read_tsv(reads_info, col_types=cols()) %>% 
    rename(Sample=sample)
  
  # Split the JobID into two parts: the main job ID and the batch job ID
  main <- raw_sacct %>% filter(!str_detect(JobID, "\\.batch$"))
  
  batch <- raw_sacct %>% 
    filter(str_detect(JobID, "\\.batch$")) %>%
    mutate(JobID=str_remove(JobID, "\\.batch$")) %>%
    select(JobID, MaxRSS_batch=MaxRSS)
  
  # Left-join the batch MaxRSS onto the main jobs
  unified <- main %>%
    left_join(batch, by="JobID") %>%
    mutate(
      MaxRSS=coalesce(MaxRSS_batch, MaxRSS),
      MaxRSS=parse_number(MaxRSS),
      MaxRSS_GB=MaxRSS / (1024^2)
    ) %>%
    select(-MaxRSS_batch) %>%
    group_by(JobName) %>%
    slice_max(Start, n=1, with_ties=FALSE) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    full_join(raw_metrics, by="JobName") %>% # Join with metrics
    filter(! str_detect(JobName, "reference"))  %>%
    extract( # Extract relevant columns from JobName
      col  =JobName,
      into =c("Program", "Sample", "depthNP", "depthIL"),
      regex="^(.+?)(?=_BS|_LLP)_(BS.+?|LLP.+?)(?:_NP(.[^_]+))?(?:_IL(.+))?$"
    ) %>%
    # full_join(reads_info_df, by="Sample") %>%
    clean_names() %>%
    filter(! is.na(total_length)) %>% # Remove entries with no assembly
    mutate(
      program=str_to_lower(program),
      depth_np=str_replace_all(depth_np, "OG", "99x"),
      depth_il=str_replace_all(depth_il, "OG", "99x"),
      depth_np=replace_na(parse_number(depth_np), 0), # Adjust this to make work with "OG"
      depth_il=replace_na(parse_number(depth_il), 0), # Adjust this to make work with "OG"
      depth_np=replace_na(depth_np, "0"), # Adjust this to make work with "OG"
      depth_il=replace_na(depth_il, "0"), # Adjust this to make work with "OG"
      strategy=case_when(
        program %in% long_reads_strategy ~ "long_reads",
        program %in% short_reads_strategy ~ "short_reads",
        program %in% hybrid_strategy ~ "hybrid",
        program %in% polished_strategy ~ "polished"
      ),
      # Elapsed_sec=parse_elapsed(as.character(Elapsed)),
      elapsed_sec=dplyr::coalesce(suppressWarnings(as.numeric(elapsed)), parse_elapsed(elapsed)),
      elapsed_min=elapsed_sec / 60,
      max_rss_per_mb=max_rss_gb / (total_length*1e-6), # Calculate MaxRSS per Mb of genome size
      elapsed_per_mb=elapsed_sec / (total_length*1e-6) # Calculate Elapsed time per Mb of genome size
    ) %>%
     # filter(end != "Unknown") %>% # Remove jobs that haven't ended
    mutate(strategy=factor(strategy, levels=c("short_reads","long_reads","hybrid","polished")),
         program = factor(program),
         sample  = factor(sample),
         # depth_eff = case_when(
         #   strategy == "short_reads" ~ depth_il,
         #   strategy == "long_reads"  ~ depth_np,
         #   strategy == "hybrid"      ~ paste0(depth_il, "+", depth_np),
         #   strategy == "polished"    ~ paste0(depth_il, "+", depth_np)
         # )
         depth_eff = case_when(
          strategy == "short_reads" ~ depth_il,
          strategy == "long_reads"  ~ depth_np,
          strategy == "hybrid"      ~ depth_il + depth_np,
          strategy == "polished"    ~ depth_il + depth_np
         )) %>% 
    rename(maxrss_gb=max_rss_gb,
           ram_per_mb=max_rss_per_mb,
           time_per_mb=elapsed_per_mb,
           mism_100kbp=number_mismatches_per_100_kbp)
  
  # df_flye_pilon <- combine_programs(unified, "flye", "pilon")
  df_flye_polypolish <- combine_programs(unified, "flye-ovl1000", "polypolish")
  # df_flye_racon <- combine_programs(unified, "flye", "racon")
  # df_flye_racon_mp2 <- combine_programs(unified, "flye", "racon-mp2")
  # 
  unified <- bind_rows(unified, df_flye_polypolish) %>%
              mutate(program=factor(program))
  
  return(unified)
}

```

## Load Data

```{r}
#| label: load_data


# Files:
# real_samples_OG_coverage_summary.tsv - Coverage stats calculated minimap2/BWA2 + samtools depth on OG assemblies
# real_samples_info.tsv              - Estimated metrics from KMC + Genomescope2 analysis
# all_sacct_real.csv                - sacct output for all real data assemblies
# quast_busco_results_real.tsv      - Quast + BUSCO results for all real data assemblies

# Extract and clean data
data_real_unfiltered <- extract_data_real("files/all_sacct_real.csv",
                                "files/quast_busco_results_real.tsv",
                                "files/real_samples_info.tsv")
data_real_unfiltered %>%
  filter(strategy %notin% c("hybrid", "polished")) %>% 
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(n=n()) %>% 
  summarise(max_value = max(n, na.rm = TRUE)) %>% as.numeric() -> max_assemblies_per_sample
  
data_real_unfiltered %>%
  filter(strategy %notin% c("hybrid", "polished")) %>% 
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(n=n(), .groups="drop") %>%
  filter(n >= 78) %>%
  pull(1)  -> complete_samples

data_real <- data_real_unfiltered %>%
              filter(sample %in% complete_samples,
                     program != "flye")
              

# Load estimated metrics for real data
reference_metrics_real <- read_tsv("files/real_samples_info.tsv", col_types=cols()) %>% 
  filter(sample %in% complete_samples) %>%
  mutate(program= case_when(
                technology == "illumina" ~ "kmc_il",
                technology == "np" ~ "kmc_np",
                technology == "chopper"  ~ "kmc_chopper",
                technology == "chopperk101" ~ "kmc_chopperk101",
                technology == "chopperk13"  ~ "kmc_chopperk13",
                technology == "chopperk13p1" ~ "kmc_chopperk13p1",
                technology == "chopperk21p1" ~ "kmc_chopperk21p1",
                technology == "chopperk57p1" ~ "kmc_chopperk57p1",
                TRUE ~ "ukn"
              ))
  

coverage_stats <- read_tsv("files/real_samples_OG_coverage_summary.tsv", col_types=cols()) %>%
  extract( # Extract relevant columns from JobName
      col  =sample,
      into =c("program", "sample", "depth_np", "depth_il"),
      regex="^(.+?)(?=_BS|_LLP)_(BS.+?|LLP.+?)(?:_NP(.[^_]+))?(?:_IL(.+))?$"
    ) %>% mutate(program = str_to_lower(program)) %>% 
  filter(sample %in% complete_samples)
```


## Summary statistics

```{r}
#| label: summary_stats

data_stats_single <- data_real %>%  filter(!is.na(n50)) %>%
  filter(strategy %notin% c("hybrid", "polished"),
         sample %in% complete_samples) %>%
  # filter(depth_np != 99, depth_il != 99) %>%
  mutate(number_contigs_small = number_contigs_0_bp - number_contigs_1000_bp) %>%
  group_by(strategy, program, depth_eff) %>% 
  summarise(
    n=n(),
    med_n50        =median(n50, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_busco      =median(busco_complete, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_busco_copy =median(busco_multi_copy, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_maxrss_gb  =median(maxrss_gb, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_ram_mb     =median(ram_per_mb, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_time_mb    =median(time_per_mb, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_sht_contig =median(number_contigs_small, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_length     =median(total_length, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_cov_depth  =median(avg_coverage_depth, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_n50       =mean(n50, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_busco     =mean(busco_complete, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_busco_copy=mean(busco_multi_copy, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_maxrss_gb =mean(maxrss_gb, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_ram_mb    =mean(ram_per_mb, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_time_mb   =mean(time_per_mb, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_time      =mean(elapsed_sec, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_sht_contig=mean(number_contigs_small, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_length    =mean(total_length, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_cov_depth =mean(avg_coverage_depth, na.rm=TRUE),
    CI_n50         =CI95(sd(n50)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_busco       =CI95(sd(busco_complete)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_busco_copy  =CI95(sd(busco_multi_copy)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_maxrss_gb   =CI95(sd(maxrss_gb)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_ram_mb      =CI95(sd(ram_per_mb)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_time_mb     =CI95(sd(time_per_mb)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_time        =CI95(sd(elapsed_sec)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_sht_contig  =CI95(sd(number_contigs_small)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_length      =CI95(sd(total_length)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_cov_depth   =CI95(sd(avg_coverage_depth)/sqrt(n),n),
    .groups="drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(color=colors_programs[as.character(program)]) %>% 
  arrange(depth_eff, program)

data_stats_multi <- data_real %>% filter(!is.na(mism_100kbp)) %>% 
  filter(strategy %in% c("hybrid", "polished"),
         sample %in% complete_samples) %>% 
  mutate(number_contigs_small = number_contigs_0_bp - number_contigs_1000_bp) %>%
  group_by(strategy, program, depth_np, depth_il) %>%
  summarise(
    n=n(),
    med_n50        =median(n50, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_busco      =median(busco_complete, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_busco_copy =median(busco_multi_copy, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_maxrss_gb  =median(maxrss_gb, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_ram_mb     =median(ram_per_mb, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_time_mb    =median(time_per_mb, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_sht_contig =median(number_contigs_small, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_length     =median(total_length, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_cov_depth  =median(avg_coverage_depth, na.rm=TRUE),
    med_mism       =median(mism_100kbp, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_n50       =mean(n50, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_busco     =mean(busco_complete, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_busco_copy=mean(busco_multi_copy, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_maxrss_gb =mean(maxrss_gb, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_ram_mb    =mean(ram_per_mb, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_time_mb   =mean(time_per_mb, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_time      =mean(elapsed_sec, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_sht_contig=mean(number_contigs_small, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_length    =mean(total_length, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_cov_depth =mean(avg_coverage_depth, na.rm=TRUE),
    mean_mism      =mean(mism_100kbp, na.rm=TRUE),
    CI_n50         =CI95(sd(n50)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_busco       =CI95(sd(busco_complete)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_busco_copy  =CI95(sd(busco_multi_copy)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_maxrss_gb   =CI95(sd(maxrss_gb)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_ram_mb      =CI95(sd(ram_per_mb)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_time_mb     =CI95(sd(time_per_mb)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_time        =CI95(sd(elapsed_sec)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_sht_contig  =CI95(sd(number_contigs_small)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_length      =CI95(sd(total_length)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_cov_depth   =CI95(sd(avg_coverage_depth)/sqrt(n),n),
    CI_mism        =CI95(sd(mism_100kbp)/sqrt(n),n),
    .groups="drop"
  ) %>% 
  mutate(color=colors_programs[as.character(program)]) %>% { . ->> tmp } %>% 
  filter(strategy %in% c("hybrid", "polished")) %>% 
  arrange(depth_np, depth_il, program)
```


## Stats Single

```{r}
#| label: stats_single
#| eval: false

sig_stars <- function(p) dplyr::case_when(
  is.na(p)       ~ "",
  p < 0.001      ~ "***",
  p < 0.01       ~ "**",
  p < 0.05       ~ "*",
  p < 0.1        ~ ".",
  TRUE           ~ ""
)

data_single <- data_real %>% filter(strategy %notin% c("hybrid", "polished"))

data_multi <- data_real %>% filter(strategy %in% c("hybrid", "polished"),
                              program %notin% c("pilon", "polypolish"))

responses <- c(
    "n50"        ="n50",
    "busco"      ="busco_complete",
    "maxrss_gb"  ="maxrss_gb",
    "ram_mb"     ="ram_per_mb",
    "time_mb"    ="time_per_mb",
    "time"       ="elapsed_sec")

# Make a lmer formula
mk_form <- function(response, rhs) {
  as.formula(sprintf("%s ~ %s", response, rhs), env=parent.frame())
}

fit_block_single <- function(df, response) {
  # #Set variables for testing
  # df <- data_single
  # response <- "n50"
  
  dff <- df %>%
    drop_na(all_of(response))
  
  depth_grid <- sort(unique(dff$depth_eff))
  
  rhs_single <- "program * depth_eff + total_length +
program:total_length +
depth_eff:total_length +
(1 | sample)"
  
  fml <- mk_form(response, rhs_single)

  mod <- lme4::lmer(fml, data=dff)
  
  anova_global_tbl <- car::Anova(mod, type = 3) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column("term") %>%
  rename(
    df = Df,
    chi_sq = Chisq,
    p_value = `Pr(>Chisq)`
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    signif = sig_stars(p_value),
    response = response,
    .before=1
  ) %>%
  arrange(p_value)

  emm_depth_by_program <- emmeans::emmeans(
    mod,
    ~ depth_eff | program,
    type = "response"
  )
  
  depth_trends_tbl <- emmeans::emtrends(
    mod,
    ~ program,
    var = "depth_eff"
  ) %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    rename(
      slope = depth_eff.trend,
      df = df,
      t_ratio = t.ratio,
      p_value = p.value
    ) %>%
    mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p_value),
      response = response,
      .before=1
    )
  
  emm_prog_by_depth <- emmeans::emmeans(
    mod,
    ~ program | depth_eff
  )
  
  prog_pairs_tbl <- emmeans::contrast(
    emm_prog_by_depth,
    method = "tukey"
  ) %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p.value),
      response = response,
      comparison_type = "program_at_depth",
      .before=1
    )

  emm_depth_by_program <- emmeans::emmeans(
    mod,
    ~ depth_eff | program,
    at = list(depth_eff = depth_grid)
  )
  
  depth_pairs_tbl <- emmeans::contrast(
    emm_depth_by_program,
    method = "tukey"
  ) %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p.value),
      response = response,
      comparison_type = "depth_within_program",
      .before=1
    )
  
  genome_trends_tbl <- emmeans::emtrends(
    mod,
    ~ program,
    var = "total_length"
  ) %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p.value),
      covariate = "total_length",
      response = response,
      .before=1
    )

  return(
    list(
      model = mod,
      global_effects = anova_global_tbl,
      depth_slopes   = depth_trends_tbl,
      genome_slopes  = genome_trends_tbl,
      prog_pairs     = prog_pairs_tbl,
      depth_pairs    = depth_pairs_tbl,
      fixed = broom.mixed::tidy(mod, effects="fixed", conf.int=TRUE),
      response = response
    )
  )
}

fits <- purrr::imap(
  responses,
  ~ fit_block_single(data_single, response = .x)
)

tbls <- imap_dfr(
  fits,
  ~ tibble(
    response_id = .y,
    global_effects = list(.x$global_effects),
    depth_slopes   = list(.x$depth_slopes),
    genome_slopes  = list(.x$genome_slopes),
    prog_pairs     = list(.x$prog_pairs),
    depth_pairs    = list(.x$depth_pairs)
  )
)

all_global_effects <- tbls %>% select(response_id, global_effects) %>% unnest(global_effects)
all_depth_slopes   <- tbls %>% select(response_id, depth_slopes)   %>% unnest(depth_slopes)
all_genome_slopes  <- tbls %>% select(response_id, genome_slopes)  %>% unnest(genome_slopes)
all_prog_pairs     <- tbls %>% select(response_id, prog_pairs)     %>% unnest(prog_pairs)
all_depth_pairs    <- tbls %>% select(response_id, depth_pairs)    %>% unnest(depth_pairs)

write_csv(all_global_effects, "results/empirical_single_global_effects.csv")
write_csv(all_depth_slopes,   "results/empirical_single_depth_slopes.csv")
write_csv(all_genome_slopes,  "results/empirical_single_genome_slopes.csv")
write_csv(all_prog_pairs,     "results/empirical_single_prog_pairs.csv")
write_csv(all_depth_pairs,    "results/empirical_single_depth_pairs.csv")
```


## Stats Hybrid/Polished

```{r}
#| label: stats_hybrid_polished
#| eval: false

sig_stars <- function(p) dplyr::case_when(
  is.na(p)       ~ "",
  p < 0.001      ~ "***",
  p < 0.01       ~ "**",
  p < 0.05       ~ "*",
  p < 0.1        ~ ".",
  TRUE           ~ ""
)

# data_full <- data %>% left_join(reference_metrics, by="sample") %>% 
#     mutate(across(c(size_mbp, gc_content, gene_density, cds_per_gene), scale))
# 
# data_polished <- data_real %>% filter(strategy %in% c("polished"),
#                               program %notin% c("pilon", "polypolish", "racon", "racon-mp2"))
# 
# data_hybrid <- data_real %>% filter(strategy %in% c("hybrid"),
#                               program %notin% c("pilon", "polypolish", "racon", "racon-mp2"))

data_multi <- data_real %>% filter(strategy %in% c("hybrid", "polished"),
                              program %notin% c("pilon", "polypolish"))

responses <- c(
    "n50"        ="n50",
    "busco"      ="busco_complete",
    "maxrss_gb"  ="maxrss_gb",
    "ram_mb"     ="ram_per_mb",
    "time_mb"    ="time_per_mb",
    "time"       ="elapsed_sec")

# Make a lmer formula
mk_form <- function(response, rhs) {
  as.formula(sprintf("%s ~ %s", response, rhs), env=parent.frame())
}

fit_block_multi_depths <- function(df, response,
                                  depth_np_var = "depth_np",
                                  depth_il_var = "depth_il",
                                  use_log_depth = FALSE) {
  # # Set up variables for testing
  # df <- data_multi
  # response <- "n50"
  # depth_np_var <- "depth_np"
  # depth_il_var <- "depth_il"
  # use_log_depth = F
  # 
  
  dff <- df %>%
    drop_na(all_of(response))

  # Optional transforms (recommended if depth effects are nonlinear)
  if (use_log_depth) {
    dff <- dff %>%
      dplyr::mutate(
        depth_np_tr = log1p(.data[[depth_np_var]]),
        depth_il_tr = log1p(.data[[depth_il_var]])
      )
    depth_np_term <- "depth_np_tr"
    depth_il_term <- "depth_il_tr"
  } else {
    depth_np_term <- depth_np_var
    depth_il_term <- depth_il_var
  }

  # Depth grids for EMMs
  depth_np_grid <- sort(unique(dff[[depth_np_var]]))
  depth_il_grid <- sort(unique(dff[[depth_il_var]]))

  # --- MODEL RHS ---
  rhs <- sprintf(
    "program * %s * %s + total_length +
     program:total_length +
     %s:total_length +
     %s:total_length +
     (1 | sample)",
    depth_np_term, depth_il_term,
    depth_np_term, depth_il_term
  )

  fml <- mk_form(response, rhs)
  mod <- lme4::lmer(fml, data = dff)

  # --- GLOBAL EFFECTS (Type III Wald chi-square) ---
  anova_global_tbl <- car::Anova(mod, type = 3) %>%
    as.data.frame() %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("term") %>%
    dplyr::rename(df = Df, chi_sq = Chisq, p_value = `Pr(>Chisq)`) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(signif = sig_stars(p_value),
                  response = response,
                  .before = 1) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(p_value)

  # --- SIMPLE SLOPES (two: NP slope and IL slope) ---
  depth_np_slopes_tbl <- emmeans::emtrends(mod, ~ program, var = depth_np_term) %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::rename(
      slope = !!paste0(depth_np_term, ".trend"),
      t_ratio = t.ratio,
      p_value = p.value
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p_value),
      response = response,
      slope_type = "np",
      .before = 1
    )

  depth_il_slopes_tbl <- emmeans::emtrends(mod, ~ program, var = depth_il_term) %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::rename(
      slope = !!paste0(depth_il_term, ".trend"),
      t_ratio = t.ratio,
      p_value = p.value
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p_value),
      response = response,
      slope_type = "il",
      .before = 1
    )

  depth_slopes_tbl <- dplyr::bind_rows(depth_np_slopes_tbl, depth_il_slopes_tbl)

  # --- PROGRAM PAIRWISE COMPARISONS at each (NP, IL) combo ---
  # Warning: can get large. Use with care if many depth combinations.
  emm_prog_by_depths <- emmeans::emmeans(
    mod,
    as.formula(sprintf("~ program | %s * %s", depth_np_var, depth_il_var)),
    pbkrtest.limit = 50000,
    at = rlang::list2(
      !!depth_np_var := depth_np_grid,
      !!depth_il_var := depth_il_grid
    )
  )
  
  prog_pairs_tbl <- emmeans::contrast(emm_prog_by_depths, method = "tukey") %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p.value),
      response = response,
      comparison_type = "program_at_depth_np_il",
      .before = 1
    )
  
  
  # --- PROGRAM PAIRWISE COMPARISONS at avarage depth ---
  emm_prog_avg_depth <- emmeans::emmeans(
    mod,
    as.formula(sprintf("~ program | %s * %s", depth_np_var, depth_il_var)),
    pbkrtest.limit = 50000
  )
  
  prog_pairs_avg_depth_tbl <- emmeans::contrast(emm_prog_avg_depth, method = "tukey") %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p.value),
      response = response,
      comparison_type = "program_averaged_over_depth",
      .before = 1
    )
  

  # --- DEPTH PAIRWISE COMPARISONS within program (two useful views) ---

  # (A) Illumina depth contrasts within each program, at each NP depth
  emm_il_by_program_np <- emmeans::emmeans(
    mod,
    as.formula(sprintf("~ %s | program * %s", depth_il_var, depth_np_var)),
    at = rlang::list2(!!depth_np_var := depth_np_grid,
                      !!depth_il_var := depth_il_grid)
  )

  il_pairs_within_np_tbl <- emmeans::contrast(emm_il_by_program_np, method = "tukey") %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p.value),
      response = response,
      comparison_type = "illumina_depth_within_program_at_np",
      .before = 1
    )

  # (B) Nanopore depth contrasts within each program, at each IL depth
  emm_np_by_program_il <- emmeans::emmeans(
    mod,
    as.formula(sprintf("~ %s | program * %s", depth_np_var, depth_il_var)),
    at = rlang::list2(!!depth_np_var := depth_np_grid,
                      !!depth_il_var := depth_il_grid)
  )

  np_pairs_within_il_tbl <- emmeans::contrast(emm_np_by_program_il, method = "tukey") %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p.value),
      response = response,
      comparison_type = "nanopore_depth_within_program_at_il",
      .before = 1
    )

  # --- GENOME SLOPES (same as before; can add more covariates similarly) ---
  genome_trends_tbl <- emmeans::emtrends(mod, ~ program, var = "total_length") %>%
    summary(infer = TRUE) %>%
    tibble::as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      signif = sig_stars(p.value),
      covariate = "total_length",
      response = response,
      .before = 1
    )

  list(
    model = mod,
    global_effects = anova_global_tbl,
    depth_slopes   = depth_slopes_tbl,
    genome_slopes  = genome_trends_tbl,
    prog_pairs     = prog_pairs_tbl,
    prog_pairs_avg_depth = prog_pairs_avg_depth_tbl,
    il_depth_pairs = il_pairs_within_np_tbl,
    np_depth_pairs = np_pairs_within_il_tbl,
    fixed = broom.mixed::tidy(mod, effects = "fixed", conf.int = TRUE),
    response = response
  )
}

fits <- purrr::imap(
  responses,
  ~ fit_block_multi_depths(data_multi, response = .x, use_log_depth = F)
)

tbls <- imap_dfr(
  fits,
  ~ tibble(
    response_id    = .y,
    global_effects = list(.x$global_effects),
    depth_slopes   = list(.x$depth_slopes),
    genome_slopes  = list(.x$genome_slopes),
    prog_pairs     = list(.x$prog_pairs),
    prog_pairs_avg = list(.x$prog_pairs_avg_depth),
    il_depth_pairs = list(.x$il_depth_pairs),
    np_depth_pairs = list(.x$np_depth_pairs)
  )
)

all_global_effects <- tbls %>% select(response_id, global_effects) %>% unnest(global_effects)
all_depth_slopes   <- tbls %>% select(response_id, depth_slopes)   %>% unnest(depth_slopes)
all_genome_slopes  <- tbls %>% select(response_id, genome_slopes)  %>% unnest(genome_slopes)
all_prog_pairs     <- tbls %>% select(response_id, prog_pairs)     %>% unnest(prog_pairs)
all_prog_pairs_avg <- tbls %>% select(response_id, prog_pairs_avg) %>% unnest(prog_pairs_avg)
all_il_depth_pairs <- tbls %>% select(response_id, il_depth_pairs) %>% unnest(il_depth_pairs)
all_np_depth_pairs <- tbls %>% select(response_id, np_depth_pairs) %>% unnest(np_depth_pairs)

write_csv(all_global_effects, "results/empirical_multi_global_effects.csv")
write_csv(all_depth_slopes,   "results/empirical_multi_depth_slopes.csv")
write_csv(all_genome_slopes,  "results/empirical_multi_genome_slopes.csv")
write_csv(all_prog_pairs,     "results/empirical_multi_prog_pairs.csv")
write_csv(all_prog_pairs_avg, "results/empirical_multi_prog_pairs_avg_depth.csv")
write_csv(all_il_depth_pairs, "results/empirical_multi_il_depth_pairs.csv")
write_csv(all_np_depth_pairs, "results/empirical_multi_np_depth_pairs.csv")
```

### Size Estimation

```{r}
#| label: size_estimation_plot
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 6
#| fig.align: center

plot_only <- c("spades_short", "spades_hybrid", "abyss_short", "kmc_il", "kmc_chopper",
               "flye-ovl1000","flye-ovl1500", "flye-ovl2000", "flye-ovl2500",
               "flye-ovl3000","flye-ovl1000_polypolish")

length_df <- data_real %>% unite("depth", depth_np, depth_il, sep="") %>%
              filter(str_detect(depth, "99")) %>% 
              select(sample, program, total_length) 

length_df <- reference_metrics_real %>%
              mutate(program= case_when(
                technology == "illumina" ~ "kmc_il",
                technology == "np" ~ "kmc_np",
                technology == "chopper"  ~ "kmc_chopper",
                technology == "chopperk101" ~ "kmc_chopperk101",
                technology == "chopperk13"  ~ "kmc_chopperk13",
                technology == "chopperk13p1" ~ "kmc_chopperk13p1",
                technology == "chopperk21p1" ~ "kmc_chopperk21p1",
                technology == "chopperk57p1" ~ "kmc_chopperk57p1",
                TRUE ~ "ukn"
              )) %>% 
              select(sample, min_bp, max_bp, mean_bp, program) %>% 
              rename(total_length=mean_bp) %>%
              bind_rows(length_df) %>% 
              filter(program %in% plot_only) %>% 
              mutate(program = factor(program, levels = plot_only))

length_df %>% filter(program %in% plot_only) %>%
  group_by(program) %>%
  mutate(total_length = total_length * 1e-6) %>%
  summarise(med_length=median(total_length), 
            mean_length=mean(total_length),
            CI_length=CI95(sd(total_length)/sqrt(n()), n()),
            .groups="drop") %>%
  arrange(med_length) -> length_summary

long_estimate <- length_summary[[1,3]]
short_estimate <- length_summary[[2,3]]
flye_1000 <- length_summary[[10,3]]
flye_3000 <- length_summary[[3,3]]

flye_diff <- (flye_1000 - flye_3000) / flye_1000 * 100

length_summary %>% 
  mutate(short_compare = mean_length - short_estimate,
         long_compare = mean_length - long_estimate,
         short_percent = short_compare / short_estimate * 100,
         long_percent = long_compare / long_estimate * 100
         ) -> length_summary

length_df %>%
  filter(program %in% plot_only) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=program, y=total_length, color=program)) +
  geom_point(size=3, alpha=0.15) +
  geom_line(aes(group=sample), alpha=0.15) +
  geom_boxplot() +
  labs(x="", y="Assembly size (Mbp)") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1e-06)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=display_labels) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.position="none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust=1)) -> size_estimation_plot
```

## Figures - Non-Hybrid and Non-Polished

```{r}
#| label: empirical_figures_not_hybrid
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 6
#| fig.align: center

program_order <- c("spades_short", "abyss_short", "flye-ovl1000",
                   "flye-ovl1500", "flye-ovl2000", "flye-ovl2500",
               "flye-ovl3000")

x_labels <- c("10x", "15x", "20x", "25x", "30x", "35x", "40x", "50x", "60x", "OG")

data_stats_single_plt <- data_stats_single %>%
  filter(program %in% program_order) %>%
  mutate(depth_eff=factor(depth_eff),
         program=factor(program, levels=program_order))

# N50 plot
plt_n50_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_n50, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program)) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_n50 - CI_n50), ymax=(mean_n50 + CI_n50)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1e-6)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=x_labels) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="N50 (Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=10) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank()) 

# Length plot
plt_length_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_length, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program)) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_length - CI_length), ymax=(mean_length + CI_length)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1e-6)) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=x_labels) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="Assembly Size (Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=10) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())

# BUSCO complete plot
plt_busco_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_busco, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program)) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_busco - CI_busco), ymax=(mean_busco + CI_busco)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=x_labels) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="BUSCO %", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=10) +
  # coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-5,5)) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())

# BUSCO Copy plot
plt_busco_copy_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_busco_copy, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program)) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_busco_copy - CI_busco_copy), ymax=(mean_busco_copy + CI_busco_copy)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=x_labels) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="BUSCO % Multiple Copy", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=10) +
  # coord_cartesian(ylim=c(-5,5)) +
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())

# Max RAM plot
plt_maxrss_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_maxrss_gb, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program)) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_maxrss_gb - CI_maxrss_gb), ymax=(mean_maxrss_gb + CI_maxrss_gb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=x_labels) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="Max RAM (GB)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=10)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())

# Max RAM per Mbp plot
plt_ram_mb_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_ram_mb, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program)) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_ram_mb - CI_ram_mb), ymax=(mean_ram_mb + CI_ram_mb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=x_labels) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="Max RAM (GB/Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=10)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())

# Time plot
plt_time_single <- data_stats_single_plt %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_time, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program)) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time - CI_time), ymax=(mean_time + CI_time)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=x_labels) +
  #scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/60)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="Time (min)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=10)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank())

# Time per Mbp plot
plt_time_mb_single <-data_stats_single_plt %>%
ggplot(aes(x=depth_eff, y=mean_time_mb, color=program)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=program)) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_time_mb - CI_time_mb), ymax=(mean_time_mb + CI_time_mb)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  scale_x_discrete(labels=x_labels) +
  #scale_y_continuous(labels=scales::label_number(scale=1/60)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth (x)", y="Time (s/Mbp)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=10)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank()) 

# Arrange plots
ggarrange(plt_n50_single, plt_length_single, plt_ram_mb_single, 
          plt_busco_single, plt_busco_copy_single, plt_time_mb_single,
          ncol=3, nrow=2, labels=c("A", "B", "C", "D", "E", "F"),
          common.legend=TRUE, legend="bottom")
```

## Figures - Multi - Hybrid and Polished

```{r}
#| label: figS9_empirical_hybrid_multi
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 6

program_order <- c("flye-ovl1000_polypolish")

x_labels <- c("10x", "15x", "20x", "25x", "30x", "35x", "40x", "50x", "60x", "OG")

data_stats_multi_plt <- data_stats_multi %>%
  filter(program %in% program_order) %>%
  mutate(depth_np=factor(depth_np),
         depth_il=factor(depth_il),
         program=factor(program, levels=program_order))

# Mismatches per 100kbp plot
data_stats_multi_plt %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=depth_il, y=mean_mism, color=program, alpha=depth_np)) +
  geom_line(aes(group=interaction(program, depth_np))) +
  geom_point(size=2) +
  geom_linerange(aes(ymin=(mean_mism - CI_mism), ymax=(mean_mism + CI_mism)),
                linewidth=0.5, show.legend = F) +
  #scale_x_continuous(breaks=c(10,15,20,25,30,35,40,50,60)) +
  scale_alpha_ordinal(name="Depth Long-reads (x)", range=c(0.25,1), breaks=c(10,30,60))+
  scale_color_manual(values=colors_programs, label=display_labels, name="Program") +
  labs(x="Depth Short-reads (x)", y="Mismatches(/100kb)", title=element_blank()) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=14)+
  theme(panel.grid.minor=element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x=element_blank(),
        legend.position = "bottom", legend.margin=margin())
```

```{r}
#| label: fig8_empirical_data
#| fig.width: 10
#| fig.height: 6
#| fig.align: center

figure_not_hybrid_summary

```
